description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every pull request and push to branches excluding pre-commit-ci*. Use a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.7, 3.8, 3.9) on different environments (ubuntu-20.04, windows-2019, macos-10.15) and cluster types (ssh, mpi, slurm). For each job, check out the repository, cache conda environments and node_modules, set up Python, install ipyparallel and its dependencies, run tests with pytest and codecov, and submit a coverage report.
